text: The biological plausibility is high. After cells sense pathogens, tissue damage or dysmetabolism, production of acute phase proteins (Key event 1438) is triggered by cellular pattern-recognition molecules, through a cytokine cascade (Mantovani & Garlanda, 2023). In the lungs, this cytokine cascade is produced by epithelial cells and resident macrophages (Key event 1495) (Moldoveanu et al., 2009).
